title: AI Podcast Generator: Turn Any Content Into a Podcast | PodcastorAI
excerpt: Your all-in-one AI podcast studio. Generate scripts, voices, and video podcasts for Spotify, YouTube & TikTok — in minutes. Try PodcastorAI for free.
content_html:
Video Podcasts for All Categories

Build Your Own AI Podcast Host

Upload a photo to create your own AI podcast host with a personalized avatar. Turn remote conversations with friends, guests, or teammates into engaging video podcasts-all without cameras or a recording studio.

Customize Your Video Podcast Style

Choose AI hosts, voices, layouts, and conversation styles to create solo podcasts, two-shot, talk shows, or split-screen discussions. Personalize every episode to match your brand and publish engaging video podcasts ready for YouTube, Spotify, and more.

Turn Any Content into a Video Podcast

Transform PDFs, documents, URL, notes, or recordings into structured podcast scripts. PodcastorAI captures the key insights, organizes your ideas into natural conversations, and prepares everything for a studio-quality video podcast.

Start Creating

Share Your Video Podcasts Anywhere

Export studio-quality video podcasts with captions, multiple formats, and platform-ready layouts. Share instantly to YouTube, Spotify, Apple Podcasts, TikTok, and more.

Step 1

Create Your AI Host

Just upload a photo to create a personalized AI host that represents your podcast. Keep the same host across every episode or create different hosts for every story.

Step 2

Import Your Content

Upload PDFs, URLs, notes, or audio recordings. PodcastorAI automatically extracts key insights, organizes your content into professional podcast script.

Step 3

Generate Audio Podcast

Choose from natural AI voices or clone your own voice to generate studio-quality podcast audio. Every episode is ready to become a professional podcast.

Step 4

Render Video Podcast

Generate your video podcast in minutes. Choose from solo shows, talk shows, or split-screen conversations, then export and share anywhere.

Creators

Turn blogs, URLs, PDFs, and trending ideas into podcast scripts, audio episodes, and video podcasts without recording from scratch.

“

PodcastorAI transformed the way I approach content creation. I can turn articles and PDFs into ready-to-publish podcasts in minutes.

“

Noah Patel

I didn’t expect it to be this easy. I uploaded a few notes and ended up with something that actually sounded like a real podcast episode, not just text read out loud.

“

Sofia Kim

What I like most is that it saves me from the part I always procrastinate on. I already have the ideas — PodcastorAI helps me turn them immediately into something I can actually publish.

“

Liam Brooks

As a teacher, I’m always looking for ways to make material easier to absorb. Turning lessons into audio has helped my students review on their own time, which I love.

“

Ava Nguyen

I’m not a full-time podcaster, so I need tools that help me move quickly. PodcastorAI makes it much easier to go from an idea or a document to something I can actually work with.

PodcastorAI is an AI video podcast generator that turns documents, URL, PDFs, notes, audio, and ideas into professional audio and video podcasts. From AI-powered script generation to customizable AI hosts, voice selection, video rendering, and publishing, everything happens in one streamlined platform.

sentences.en: It helped me get more value out of content I’d already made.
sentences.zh: 它帮助我从已经制作的内容中获得更多价值。

sentences.en: Instead of creating from scratch every time, I can turn one piece of content into audio, video, and shorter clips.
sentences.zh: 我可以将一段内容转换为音频、视频和更短的剪辑，而不是每次都从头开始创建。

blocks.html_en: Lucas Reed

sentences.en: Lucas Reed
sentences.zh: 卢卡斯·里德

blocks.html_en: PodcastorAI helped me turn scattered ideas into an actual episode way faster than I’m used to. It feels like having a production shortcut without losing the creative part I still care about.

sentences.en: PodcastorAI helped me turn scattered ideas into an actual episode way faster than I’m used to.
sentences.zh: PodcastorAI 帮助我将零散的想法转变为实际的剧集，速度比我以前习惯的速度要快。

sentences.en: It feels like having a production shortcut without losing the creative part I still care about.
sentences.zh: 感觉就像拥有了一条制作捷径，而又不失去我仍然关心的创意部分。

blocks.html_en: Mia Chen

sentences.en: Mia Chen

blocks.html_en: This is one of the first AI tools I’ve used that actually makes the work feel lighter. Not noisier, not more complicated — just lighter.

sentences.en: This is one of the first AI tools I’ve used that actually makes the work feel lighter.
sentences.zh: 这是我使用的第一个人工智能工具，它实际上让工作变得更轻松。

sentences.en: Not noisier, not more complicated — just lighter.
sentences.zh: 不吵闹，不复杂，只是更轻。

blocks.html_en: PodcastorAI is an AI video podcast generator that turns documents, URL, PDFs, notes, audio, and ideas into professional audio and video podcasts. From AI-powered script generation to customizable AI hosts, voice selection, video rendering, and publishing, everything happens in one streamlined platform.

sentences.en: PodcastorAI is an AI video podcast generator that turns documents, URL, PDFs, notes, audio, and ideas into professional audio and video podcasts.
sentences.zh: PodcastorAI 是一款 AI 视频播客生成器，可将文档、URL、PDF、笔记、音频和想法转换为专业的音频和视频播客。

sentences.en: From AI-powered script generation to customizable AI hosts, voice selection, video rendering, and publishing, everything happens in one streamlined platform.
sentences.zh: 从人工智能驱动的脚本生成到可定制的人工智能主机、语音选择、视频渲染和发布，一切都发生在一个简化的平台上。

content_html_zh:
所有类别的视频播客

打造您自己的人工智能播客主持人

上传照片即可创建您自己的具有个性化头像的 AI 播客主持人。 将与朋友、客人或队友的远程对话转变为引人入胜的视频播客 - 无需摄像头或录音室。

自定义您的视频播客风格

选择 AI 主持人、声音、布局和对话风格来创建独奏播客、双镜头、脱口秀或分屏讨论。 个性化每一集以匹配您的品牌，并发布可供 YouTube、Spotify 等使用的引人入胜的视频播客。

将任何内容变成视频播客

将 PDF、文档、URL、注释或录音转换为结构化播客脚本。 PodcastorAI 捕捉关键见解，将您的想法组织成自然对话，并为工作室品质的视频播客做好一切准备。

开始创作

随时随地分享您的视频播客

导出带有字幕、多种格式和平台就绪布局的工作室品质视频播客。 立即分享到 YouTube、Spotify、Apple 播客、TikTok 等。

Step 1

创建您的人工智能主机

只需上传照片即可创建代表您播客的个性化 AI 主持人。 在每个剧集中保持相同的主持人，或者为每个故事创建不同的主持人。

Step 2

导入您的内容

上传 PDF、URL、注释或录音。 PodcastorAI 自动提取关键见解，将您的内容组织成专业的播客脚本。

Step 3

生成音频播客

选择自然的 AI 声音或克隆您自己的声音以生成工作室品质的播客音频。 每一集都已准备好成为专业播客。

Step 4

渲染视频播客

在几分钟内生成您的视频播客。 从独奏节目、脱口秀或分屏对话中进行选择，然后导出并在任何地方共享。

创作者

将博客、URL、PDF 和热门想法转化为播客脚本、音频片段和视频播客，无需从头开始录制。

“

PodcastorAI 改变了我内容创作的方式。 我可以在几分钟内将文章和 PDF 转换为准备发布的播客。

“

诺亚·帕特尔

我没想到会这么容易。 我上传了一些笔记，最终得到的内容实际上听起来像是真正的播客剧集，而不仅仅是大声朗读的文字。

“

索菲亚·金

我最喜欢的是它把我从我总是拖延的部分中拯救出来。 我已经有了想法——PodcastorAI 帮助我立即将它们变成我可以实际发布的东西。

“

利亚姆·布鲁克斯

作为一名教师，我一直在寻找让材料更容易吸收的方法。 将课程转换为音频可以帮助我的学生在自己的时间复习，这是我喜欢的。

“

艾娃·阮

我不是全职播客，所以我需要能够帮助我快速行动的工具。 PodcastorAI 使我可以更轻松地从想法或文档转变为我可以实际使用的东西。

“

PodcastorAI 是一款 AI 视频播客生成器，可将文档、URL、PDF、笔记、音频和想法转换为专业的音频和视频播客。 从人工智能驱动的脚本生成到可定制的人工智能主机、语音选择、视频渲染和发布，一切都发生在一个简化的平台上。
